name: Cranberry-Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Low-Fat Milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. Spray 12 muffin cups with cooking spray.
3. In a small bowl, pour the milk over the bran cereal and let it soften.
4. In a large bowl, beat the egg well. Add the molasses, olive or canola oil, and maple syrup, and mix thoroughly.
5. In another bowl, combine the whole wheat pastry flour, cake flour, wheat germ, baking powder, and salt, stirring to blend. Add the walnuts and cranberries and mix well.
6. Fold the milk-soaked bran into the egg mixture, mixing well.
7. Pour the bran mixture over the dry ingredients and stir thoroughly.
8. Spoon the batter into the muffin cups, filling each one to the top.
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
Yields: 1 dozen 3-inch muffins
Available in health food stores
